stemHtml: Which statement completes the following sentence correctly. The ICAO CNS/ATM (Communication, Navigation, Surveillance / Air Traffic Management) concept…

options.a: Includes the use of data link for communication, and GNSS to increase navigation accuracy.
options.b: Aims to increase flight safety by extending the range of ground-based navigation aids.
options.c: Is restricted to Commercial Air Transport operations only.
options.d: Aims to improve voice communication procedures to minimise the clearance response time.
